case_title: FENEYDA GUERRERO ET AL VS. MAUREEN O'NEILL

docket_entries.description: NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS FENEYDA GUERRERO OR NANCY RODRIGUEZ. CLAIM WAS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT MAUREEN O'NEILL AT THE LAST CALLING OF THE CASE ON 8/17/16. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRUCE LUBARSKY. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO MAUREEN O'NEILL BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF AUG-17-2016 AT 8:30 AM PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFFS' REQUEST. PLAINTIFFS SHALL AMEND THEIR CLAIM TO NAME THE CORRECT DEFENDANTS. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $777.00 FILED BY GUERRERO, FENEYDA RODRIGUEZ, NANCY AS TO DEFENDANT O'NEILL, MAUREEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-17-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT O'NEILL, MAUREEN
REMARK: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO NANCY RODRIGUEZ ON 08/17/16 RETURNED BY USPS LABELED ""RETURN TO SENDER - NOT KNOWN."
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED JUL-01-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT O'NEILL, MAUREEN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-17-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO SEP-02-2016 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF FENEYDA GUERRERO & DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE MARLENE O'NEILL, THE SISTER OF DEFENDANT MAUREEN O'NEILL, WHO WAS UNABLE TO ATTEND TODAY'S PROCEEDINGS DUE TO HEALTH ISSUES. ADDITIONALLY, DEFENDANT NANCY RODRIGUEZ WAS NOT PRESENT FOR THIS MORNING'S PROCEEDINGS DUE TO A FAMILY EMERGENCY. MS. GUERRERO REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT SHE IS AUTHORIZED TO APPEAR ON DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ' BEHALF. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. MATTER IS CONTINUED IN ORDER FOR PLAINTIFFS TO AMEND THEIR COMPLAINT TO NAME THE CORRECT DEFENDANTS. GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, THIS MATTER IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT MAUREEN O'NEILL. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUERRERO, FENEYDA RODRIGUEZ, NANCY AS TO DEFENDANT O'NEILL, MAUREEN
